summary: URGENT login bug retest — PASS. The Node v22 reinstall + Login.jsx useEffect([user]) refactor fully resolved the redirect race condition. Login with contact@exevori.com / Exevori_Test_2026! successfully redirects to /dashboard, session persists across reload, and protected routes /calls + /emails are accessible without re-login.
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard page does NOT expose data-testid='patient-dashboard' or data-testid='dashboard' on its root element. The test relied on the absence of data-testid='login-card' + presence of nav-link-* sidebar items as proof of dashboard render. Consider adding data-testid='dashboard-page' on /dashboard root for cleaner E2E assertions in future iterations.

Login.jsx useEffect([user]) navigation pattern is correct and resolves the previous race condition with onAuthStateChange. Confirmed working across fresh login, page reload (Supabase localStorage persistence), and direct route navigation.

The frontend lives at /app/voicedesk_project/voicedesk/frontend (Vite on :3000) and backend at /app/voicedesk_project/voicedesk/backend (Node Express on :8001). REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL in /app/frontend/.env points to the preview URL but the actual app uses the local Vite dev URL — fine for this dev/preview setup.
seed_data_creation: None — used existing seeded super_admin account.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login flow fully validated end-to-end. Confirmed data-testids on login: login-page, login-form, login-email-input, login-password-input, login-submit-button, login-card (removed after login). Confirmed nav sidebar testids: nav-link-dashboard, nav-link-calls, nav-link-outbound, nav-link-emails, nav-link-crm, nav-link-calendar, nav-link-knowledge, nav-link-config, nav-link-support. Dashboard does NOT have its own data-testid (use absence of login-card as proxy). Session persists via Supabase localStorage across page.reload() and direct route navigation. No console errors, no pageerrors, no network failures during login flow.

test_results_detail.login_page_loads: PASS — data-testid='login-page' (count=1) + data-testid='login-form' (count=1) present at http://localhost:3000/login
test_results_detail.fill_credentials: PASS — data-testid='login-email-input' and data-testid='login-password-input' both exist and accepted input
test_results_detail.submit_redirects_to_dashboard: PASS — wait_for_url('**/dashboard**', timeout=15s) succeeded; final URL = http://localhost:3000/dashboard
test_results_detail.dashboard_testid_present: PARTIAL — data-testid='patient-dashboard' nor data-testid='dashboard' is set (count=0). However sidebar + dashboard content render correctly, so this is a missing-testid observation, not a functional failure.
test_results_detail.sidebar_nav_visible: PASS — 9 nav-link-* items found including nav-link-calls and nav-link-emails
test_results_detail.bonus_reload_persistence: PASS — page.reload() kept user on /dashboard (Supabase localStorage session persisted)
test_results_detail.bonus_nav_to_calls: PASS — direct navigation to /calls stayed on /calls (no redirect to /login)
test_results_detail.bonus_nav_to_emails: PASS — direct navigation to /emails stayed on /emails (no redirect to /login)

rca_of_the_issue: Previous bug: Login.jsx called navigate('/dashboard') immediately after supabase.auth.signInWithPassword resolved, BEFORE onAuthStateChange in AuthContext updated the user state. ProtectedRoute then saw !user and redirected back to /login, creating a loop. FIX VERIFIED: Login.jsx now uses useEffect with dependency [user] that triggers navigation only once user is set in AuthContext. Combined with Node v22 reinstall (Supabase realtime-js requires Node >=22 for native WebSocket support, otherwise backend crashes on startup), the entire login flow now works flawlessly.
